de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule

Class SymbolicExecutionState

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.Pair<Term,Term>
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule.SymbolicExecutionState

  • public class SymbolicExecutionState
extends Pair<Term,Term>
    A symbolic execution state is a pair of a symbolic state in form of a parallel update, and a path condition in form of a JavaDL formula.
    Author:
    Dominic Scheurer

      • SymbolicExecutionState

        Parameters:

        pathCondition - The path condition (formula).
        correspondingNode - The node corresponding to this SE state.

      • rmN

        private String rmN(String str)
        Removes a trailing newline (\n) char from the given string.
        Parameters:
        str - The string to remove the newline char from.
        Returns:
        The given string with the removed trailing \n char, or the original string if it does not end with an \n.
